message:
fix(runtime,decoding): remove spurious finalizer guard from region advance and improve decoding error mapping

runtime/state.rs:
- Remove has_finalizers guard from region-advance check: a region with no
  children and no tasks should advance regardless of finalizer state, since
  finalizers run during the advance phase itself. The old guard caused regions
  with pending finalizers but no tasks to stall indefinitely.
- Fix 2 tests (cancel_request_propagates_to_child_region,
  cascading_cancel_propagates_through_region_hierarchy) that were testing
  cancel on empty regions by adding task records so the cancel path actually
  exercises meaningful state transitions
- Update golden hash constants for runtime_state_region_lifecycle and
  lab_runtime_deterministic to reflect the changed region advance behavior

decoding.rs:
- Refactor SourceBlockDecoder::accept_encoding_symbol to map decode_block
  errors through a dedicated helper rather than inlining the match, improving
  readability and ensuring all error variants are covered consistently
- Preserve existing reject/retry semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
